description: Explore different cooking methods and when to use them for various dishes.

steps.instruction: Learn about different cooking methods: boiling, sautéing, steaming, and baking.
Understand the best uses for each cooking method.
Practice each method with simple ingredients.
Experiment with combining methods for complex dishes.

safety_tips: Always monitor food while cooking to prevent burning.
Use appropriate cookware for each method to ensure safety and efficiency.
